text:
Question: A person puts on a coat before walking into snow. Why?
A. To stay warm
B. To hear music
C. To sharpen pencils
D. To weigh luggage
label: A

text:
Question: If a cup falls from a table, what is likely?
(A) It will become a cloud (B) It may hit the floor (C) It will call someone (D) It will turn into bread
label: B

text:
Question: A student studies before an exam. What are they trying to improve?
A) The weather
B) The height of a door
C) Their chance of answering correctly
D) The color of a chair
label: C

text:
Question: A dog is wagging its tail and running to its owner. What is likely?
Options: A: It is reading | B: It is typing | C: It is boiling | D: It is excited
label: D

text:
Question: Someone hears thunder right after seeing lightning. What is nearby?
A. A storm
B. A bakery
C. A museum
D. A library card
label: A

text:
Question: A person washes hands before cooking. What is the main reason?
(A) Decoration (B) Hygiene (C) Navigation (D) Accounting
label: B

text:
Question: A package marked fragile should be handled how?
A) Roughly
B) Underwater
C) Carefully
D) With a hammer
label: C

text:
Question: A cyclist wears a helmet mainly to protect what?
Options: A: Shoes | B: Lunch | C: Ticket | D: Head
label: D

text:
Question: A person puts leftovers in a refrigerator. Why?
A. To slow spoilage
B. To make them louder
C. To print them
D. To turn them into glass
label: A

text:
Question: If a key does not fit a lock, what is likely?
(A) It is raining (B) It is the wrong key (C) The key is hungry (D) The door is singing
label: B

text:
Question: A musician tightens a guitar string. What changes?
A) Flavor
B) Temperature of the room
C) Pitch
D) Calendar date
label: C

text:
Question: A runner drinks water after a race. Why?
Options: A: To send mail | B: To cut paper | C: To build a bridge | D: To rehydrate
label: D

text:
Question: If a sidewalk is icy, what should people do?
A. Walk carefully
B. Run faster
C. Close their eyes
D. Use more soap
label: A

text:
Question: A person checks a map before driving somewhere new. Why?
(A) To bake cookies (B) To find the route (C) To choose socks (D) To charge a battery
label: B

text:
Question: A lamp does not turn on until plugged in. What did it need?
A) Paint
B) Salt
C) Electric power
D) A stamp
label: C

text:
Question: Someone puts sunscreen on before the beach. Why?
Options: A: To clean dishes | B: To sharpen a knife | C: To print tickets | D: To protect skin
label: D

text:
Question: A teacher lowers their voice during a test. Why?
A. To avoid distracting students
B. To make rain
C. To open a bottle
D. To inflate tires
label: A

text:
Question: If a balloon is poked with a pin, what may happen?
(A) It may become stone (B) It may pop (C) It may write a song (D) It may turn cold
label: B

text:
Question: A person locks the door before sleeping. Why?
A) Cooking
B) Painting
C) Security
D) Swimming
label: C

text:
Question: If clothes are wet, what helps dry them?
Options: A: More water | B: Dirt | C: A sealed bag | D: Airflow and time
label: D
